Comment: inspect prod compose env after deploy

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && echo ---COMPOSE-RESULTS--- && docker compose --env-file .env config | grep -A20 "results-api:" | sed -n "1,40p" && echo ---COMPOSE-LINE--- && docker compose --env-file .env config | grep -A20 "line-relay:" | sed -n "1,40p" && echo ---RESULTS-ENV--- && docker compose exec -T results-api env | grep -E "^(GOVERNOR_RESULTS_PREFIX|RESULTS_API_STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX|RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE|RESULTS_API_S3_BUCKET|RESULTS_API_S3_PREFIX|ELECTION_S3_PREFIX)=" && echo ---LINE-ENV--- && docker compose exec -T line-relay env | grep -E "^(GOVERNOR_RESULTS_PREFIX|STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX|STATIC_RESULTS_S3_BUCKET|RESULTS_API_INTERNAL_BASE_URL|RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE)=" && echo ---RESULTS-SETTINGS--- && docker compose exec -T results-api python - <<"PY"
from hermes.results_api.app import settings
print({"static_results_prefix": settings.static_results_prefix, "default_data_mode": settings.default_data_mode, "bucket": settings.bucket_name, "prefix": settings.prefix})
PY'
